notes: Level 8 packet 15-19 manual review decisions. Closed entries include reasons; open entries are schema propagation work.

maze::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Closed: detector matched occupied-space fallback; target remains one visible creature and reappearance fallback is now a utility option.

maze::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: sight is ordinary targeting and already represented by Line of Sight true.

maze::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Closed: banishment to labyrinthine demiplane and return space are now utility/control options.

maze::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: Study action escape check and success ending are now utility/control options.

maze::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Closed: target reappearing in original or nearest unoccupied space is now the Reappear on end option.

mighty-fortress::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: door placement, room layout, furnishings, designated servant command permissions, and permanent-casting choice are now utility options.

mighty-fortress::multi_instance_or_split.issue: Closed: four turrets, up to four doors, rooms, and one hundred servants are now captured by spatial details and utility/summoning effects.
mighty-fortress::multi_instance_or_split.recommendedTemplateChange: Existing spatial details plus new utility options preserve counts.

mighty-fortress::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: ground eligibility and no-existing-structures requirement are now a Ground eligibility option.
mighty-fortress::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Changed runtime validTargets to ground and added option.

mighty-fortress::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: sight is ordinary placement targeting and already represented by Line of Sight true.

mighty-fortress::created_object_or_struc.issue: Closed: fortress structure, keep, doors, furnishings, food, crumble behavior, and permanence are now utility options plus existing spatial details.

mighty-fortress::summon_or_controlled_en.issue: Closed: one hundred invisible servants are now a runtime SUMMONING effect.
mighty-fortress::summon_or_controlled_en.recommendedJsonChange: Added SUMMONING servant effect with count 100.

mighty-fortress::resource_or_consumption.issue: Closed: costly consumed diamond was already represented; food production/removal crumble are now utility options.

mighty-fortress::object_stats_or_damagea.issue: Closed: stone section AC/HP/immunities/destruction/collapse text is now a Stone durability utility option, with detailed data still tracked as schema gap.

mighty-fortress::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: harmless lift and safe leave-on-ground text do not apply a named condition; they are preserved in utility options/description.

mighty-fortress::environmental_change.issue: Closed: fortress eruption/crumble/sinkback and permanence are now structure utility options.
mighty-fortress::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Temporary fortress and Permanent fortress options.

mind-blank::sensor_or_remote_perception.issue: Closed: emotion/alignment sensing, thought reading, location detection, information gathering, remote observation, and mind-control blocks are now utility options.

mind-blank::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Closed: Charmed immunity and information-gathering protection are now represented by defensive/utility effects.
mind-blank::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Defense Type immunity and utility options.

mind-blank::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: this is immunity to Charmed rather than applying Charmed; it is now represented as defensive immunity.

mind-blank::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: detector matched "until the spell ends"; no special early ending exists beyond duration.

power-word-stun::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: no initial save exists; end-turn Constitution save is now repeatSave on the Stunned condition.
power-word-stun::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Added End-turn save utility option and Save Outcome negates_condition.

power-word-stun::repeat_save_or_recurrin.issue: Closed: Stunned target end-turn Constitution save is now runtime repeatSave metadata.

power-word-stun::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: sight is ordinary targeting and already represented by Line of Sight true.

power-word-stun::object_stats_or_damagea.issue: Closed: 150 Hit Point threshold is not object stats; it is now a Hit point threshold utility option and schema gap.

power-word-stun::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: Stunned and alternate Speed 0 branch are now represented by status and movement effects.
power-word-stun::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Conditions Applied: Stunned and Movement Type stop.

power-word-stun::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: end-turn successful save ending the Stunned condition is now repeatSave metadata.

sunburst::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: point choice is ordinary area targeting already represented by ranged area geometry.

sunburst::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: Constitution damage save and repeat save for Blinded are now represented by damage/status effects.
sunburst::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Blinded condition and utility options.

sunburst::repeat_save_or_recurring_check.issue: Closed: end-turn Constitution repeat save for Blinded is now repeatSave metadata.

sunburst::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: brilliant sunlight and Darkness dispel are now utility/control options.
sunburst::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Added Brilliant sunlight and Darkness dispel options.

sunburst::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: Blinded is now explicit structured condition and runtime STATUS_CONDITION effect.

maze.issue: Actionable open: Maze needs a banishment/demiplane containment and escape-check schema instead of only utility options.
maze.recommendedTemplateChange: Add banishment destination, escape action/check/DC, and return-space fields.
maze.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
maze.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
maze.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

mighty-fortress.issue: Actionable open: Mighty Fortress needs durable created-structure stats for sections, per-inch HP, damage immunities, connected collapse, permanence cadence, and generated food/servants as data.
mighty-fortress.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-structure stat, permanence cadence, generated resource, and servant-control fields.
mighty-fortress.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdStructure, structureSectionStats, permanenceRule, generatedResources, and servantStaff objects.
mighty-fortress.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
mighty-fortress.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
mighty-fortress.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

mind-blank.issue: Actionable open: Mind Blank needs anti-divination/mind-control protection fields and condition-immunity fields that are not just damage immunity arrays.
mind-blank.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionImmunities and informationProtection objects.
mind-blank.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
mind-blank.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
mind-blank.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

power-word-stun.issue: Actionable open: Power Word Stun needs hit-point threshold branching and alternate Speed 0 branch fields.
power-word-stun.recommendedTemplateChange: Add thresholdBranch fields for target HP and alternate effects.
power-word-stun.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime thresholdBranches with <=150 Stunned and >150 Speed 0 outcomes.
power-word-stun.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
power-word-stun.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
power-word-stun.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.

sunburst.issue: Actionable open: Sunburst needs light/darkness interaction fields for dispelling Darkness created by any spell.
sunburst.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dispelsDarkness or lightInteraction object.
sunburst.canonicalEvidence: Manual level-8 review identified this mechanic from the canonical prose.
sunburst.structuredState: Structured markdown preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
sunburst.jsonState: Runtime JSON preserves this mainly as utility/options/prose pending a richer schema bucket.
